landing.heroDescription: Kola ebifaananyi by'okusoma ebirungi, ebibiino, emirimu, empapula z'okukola n'ebifo by'evidiyo mu sikonda. Leka AI ekole omulimu omuzito olyoke obeere n'ekisinga obukulu - abayizi bo.
landing.featuresTitle: Byonna By'weetaaga Okukola Ebirimu Ebirungi Ennyo
landing.demoSubtitle: Laba abasomesa bwe bakola ebirimu by'okusoma ebirungi ennyo mu sikonda 60 zokka
landing.demoPlaySubtext: Laba bwe kwangu okukola ebikozesebwa by'essomo
landing.sampleSubtitle: Ebyokulabirako eby'amazima ebikolebwa abasomesa abakozesa BrightBoard
landing.testimonialSubtitle: Yingira abayizi enkumi abakola essomo ezirungi n'AI
landing.ctaSubtitle: Yingira abasomesa mu nsi yonna abakuuma essawa buli wiiki n'okukola ebirimu n'AI. Tandika bwereere leero - tewetaagisibwa kaadi ya kireditta.
landing.faq1Answer: Nnyonnyola kiki ky'oyagala okukola, ne AI yaffe ekola ebirimu by'okusoma eby'ekitendeke mu sikonda. Osobola okukola ebifaananyi, ebibiino, empapula z'okukola, emizannyo gy'okukwatagana, ebifo by'evidiyo, n'ebirimu by'ebiwandiiko ku ssomo lyonna n'omutindo gwonna.
landing.faq2Answer: Yee! Entiikka yaffe ey'obwereere ekuwa okukola ebirimu 5 buli lunaku. Kino kirungi okugerako ekifo n'okukola ebikozesebwa eby'omutindo ku masomo go.
landing.faq3Answer: BrightBoard ewagira ebika 6 eby'ebirimu: ebifaananyi by'okusoma, ebibiino ebiramba n'ebiwandiiko by'omwogezi, empapula z'okukola ezisobiika, emizannyo gy'okukwatagana (nga Lucky Spinner ne Memory Match), ebifo by'evidiyo n'okwogera kwa AI, n'ebirimu by'ebiwandiiko nga engero n'ebinnyonnyola.
landing.faq4Question: Nsobola okukozesa ebirimu mu kibiina kyange?
landing.faq4Answer: Mazima! Ebirimu byonna by'okola byo okukozesa mu kibiina kyo, okugabana n'abayizi, okusoba, oba okuyingiza mu bikozesebwa byo eby'okusomesa. Abakozesa ba Premium bafuna ebirimu ebitaliiko akabonero ka mazzi.
landing.faq5Answer: BrightBoard ewagira ennimi 11 omuli Olungereza, Olufalansa, Olusipeyini, Olupotugiizi, Olulabu, Oluhindu, Oluswaahiri, Oluzulu, Olucayina Olumandarine, Oluvyetinamu, ne Oluganda. Osobola okukola ebirimu n'okukozesa ekifo mu lulimi lwonna luno.
landing.faq6Answer: Emizannyo gyaffe nga Lucky Spinner, Memory Match, ne Quiz Show gizannyibwa ddala ku yintaneeti. Kola omuzannyo, n'oluvannyuma oguzannye mu bulawuza bwo oba ogabane lliinki n'abayizi bo ku kusoma okuli wala.
landing.slideImageDesc: Kola ebifaananyi ebirungi, ebirungi eri abaana ku nsonga yonna mu sikonda
landing.slidePresentationDesc: Ebibiino ebiramba n'ebifaananyi n'ebiwandiiko by'omwogezi, bisituke okusomesa
landing.slideWorksheetDesc: Jjuzamu ebifo, kulonda omu, n'okuwandiika n'ebikozesebwa n'eby'okuddamu
landing.slideGameDesc: Lucky Spinner, Memory Match, Quiz Show n'ebirala - bizannyibwa ku yintaneeti
landing.slideVideoDesc: Emikutu gy'okulaba ekifaananyi ku kifaananyi n'okwogera kwa AI n'ennyimba ey'emabega
landing.slideTextDesc: Engero, ebinnyonnyola, n'ebikozesebwa by'okusoma ku mutindo gwonna gw'ekibiina
landing.testimonial1Quote: BrightBoard ekyusizzaamu okutegeka kw'essomo lyange. Ekyalimu essawa kati kisasula eddakiika. Abayizi bange baagala ebibiino eby'amalangi!
landing.testimonial2Quote: Ekikozesebwa ky'emizannyo egy'okukwatagana kirungi nnyo. Abayizi bange bayingidde nnyo okusinga bwe bali. Lucky Spinner efuuse ey'okwagalwa ennyo mu kibiina!
landing.testimonial3Quote: Nga musomesa w'ennimi, njagala nnyo nti BrightBoard ewagira ennimi ezitali zimu. Okukola empapula z'okukola ez'ennimi bbiri kati kwangu nnyo!
landing.testimonial4Quote: Ebifo by'evidiyo n'okwogera kwa AI bimpadde okukola ebirimu by'okusoma abayizi bange bye basobola okulaba ewaka. Ekikozesebwa ekya kitalo!

contentTypes.imageDesc: Kola ebifaananyi ebirungi, ebisigade mu kibiina ebikola ebirowoozo bifuuke eby'amaanyi
contentTypes.presentationDesc: Kola ebibiino ebiramba n'ebifaananyi n'ebiwandiiko by'omwogezi mu budde butono
contentTypes.textDesc: Kola engero, ebinnyonnyola n'ebikozesebwa mu kusoma ebyenkanaankana n'omutindo gwonna
contentTypes.activityDesc: Tegeka ebibuuzo eby'okukwatagana, emizannyo gy'okugatta n'emirimu gy'ekibiina esanyusa
contentTypes.storyboardDesc: Tegekeraho evidiyo ez'okusoma ez'okuvuga n'emikutu gy'okulaba ekifaananyi ku kifaananyi
contentTypes.worksheetDesc: Kola empapula z'okukola ezisobiika n'ebibuuzo, ojjuzeewo ebifo n'ebirala

auth.loginSubtitle: Yingira okwongera okukola ebirimu ebirungi ennyo
auth.signupSubtitle: Tandika okukola ebirimu by'okusoma mu sikonda

home.chooseType: Londa ekika ky'ebirimu era nnyonnyola ky'oyetaaga. AI erikukukolera mu sikonda.
home.subject: Essomo
home.startCreating: Tandika okulonda ekika ky'ebirimu n'okuyingiza ennyonnyola waggulu.

footer.description: Ekifo ky'okukola ebirimu ekikozesebwa AI ky'abasomesa abalina emirimu emingi. Kola ebifaananyi by'okusoma, ebibiino, emirimu, empapula z'okukola n'ebifo by'evidiyo mu sikonda.

language.choosePreferred: Londa olulimi lwo olw'okwagala ku BrightBoard
